parameters.query:
WITH parsed_date AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN $1 ~ '^\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{4}$' THEN to_date($1, 'DD-MM-YYYY')
      WHEN $1 ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$' THEN to_date($1, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
      ELSE CURRENT_DATE
    END AS fecha
),
asesores AS (
  SELECT ru.id AS user_id, rp.name AS asesor_nombre
  FROM res_users ru
  JOIN res_partner rp ON rp.id = ru.partner_id
  WHERE ru.active = true
    AND ($2 = 0 OR ru.id = $2)
  ORDER BY rp.name
  LIMIT 10
),
eventos AS (
  SELECT
    ce.user_id,
    to_char(ce.start AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil', 'HH24:MI') AS hora_inicio,
    to_char(ce.stop AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil', 'HH24:MI') AS hora_fin,
    ce.name AS evento
  FROM calendar_event ce, parsed_date pd
  WHERE ce.user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM asesores)
    AND ce.start::date = pd.fecha
    AND ce.active = true
)
SELECT
  a.user_id,
  a.asesor_nombre,
  pd.fecha::text AS fecha_consultada,
  COALESCE(
    json_agg(
      json_build_object('hora_inicio', e.hora_inicio, 'hora_fin', e.hora_fin, 'evento', e.evento)
    ) FILTER (WHERE e.hora_inicio IS NOT NULL),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS horarios_ocupados,
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(e.hora_inicio) = 0 THEN 'Totalmente disponible'
    WHEN COUNT(e.hora_inicio) < 4 THEN 'Parcialmente disponible'
    ELSE 'Agenda muy llena'
  END AS disponibilidad
FROM asesores a
CROSS JOIN parsed_date pd
LEFT JOIN eventos e ON e.user_id = a.user_id
GROUP BY a.user_id, a.asesor_nombre, pd.fecha;
